description: instr 037/038: the cross-platform simulator in LOG mode (with noise) writing its own log, driven through the FR-41 tail adapter via the `adapter: tail` selector. The sim writes IN_PROGRESS + noise + a terminal line to {RUN_DIR}/sim.log; the success_regex 'COMPLETED' picks the relevant line out of the noise and maps to COMPLETED. FR-56: adapter_activity_patterns is synthesized into --activity-regex and passed to the real tail adapter -- proving the synthesis path + the display-only firewall (patterns present, doneness unchanged: the run still reaches done).
